comments.comment:
H2S from disposals and transfers increased due to the following: 
1- the limited use of the Sulphur Removal unit in 2024. As a result, the produced gas from Rush Lake was transferred to the Rush Lake 2 facility for disposal, so the H2S from off-site transfers increased.
2-increased produced water disposal volume in 2024

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
"Reduced emissions was due to reduced amount of the combusted  sour gas as a result of two main factors: 
1-Reduced amount of the produced sour gas as a result of the overall decreased production due to natural decline and
2- The Produced Gas Injection project in Q4 of 2023 . Most of the produced sour gas was injected in the last three months of 2023 reducing the amount of the sour gas combusted in the OTSGs and flares."

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment:
H2S from disposals and transfers increased due to the following: 
1-the limited use of the Sulphur Removal unit in the third quarter of 2023. As a result, the produced gas from Rush Lake was transferred to the Rush Lake 2 facility for disposal for the last quarter, so the H2S from off-site transfers increased. 
2-Increased produced water disposal volume in 2023.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Emissions increased as a result of the following two main factors: 
1-increased  sour gas production due to maturing wells, and
2-increased volume of the untreated produced gas combusted in the OTSGs and flares. 
The volume of the treated produced gas in the SRU increased also, but did not offset the emissions increase from the two factors mentioned above.
